name: Reclaim the Surface
visual_description: Two massive dinosaurs with muted earthy hides—dusty brown and slate grey—crash through crumbling stone ruins overgrown with vines. Ancient artifacts and enchanted relics shatter beneath their feet as vegetation reclaims the fractured landscape. Raw primal power dominates the frame.
full_prompt: Two massive dinosaurs with muted earthy hides—dusty brown and slate grey—crash through crumbling stone ruins overgrown with vines. Ancient artifacts and enchanted relics shatter beneath their feet as vegetation reclaims the fractured landscape. Raw primal power dominates the frame.. Stylized digital illustration, wide naturalist composition, rich earth tones with dappled light, layered depth, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
